site.name: three.ws
site.description: three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity (ERC-8004), pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches.

pages.title: Home
pages.description: Landing page. 3D AI agents that think on IBM watsonx.ai (Granite) — the pitch, live agent demos, and the front door to every flow.

pages.title: Discover
pages.description: On-chain agent directory (ERC-8004 + Solana). Browse, search, and inspect every registered agent.

pages.title: Avatar Gallery
pages.description: Every public 3D avatar in the system, browsable as a grid.

pages.title: Walk
pages.description: Drive a 3D avatar around with a joystick or WASD — toggle the back camera for AR-style passthrough.

pages.title: Marketplace
pages.description: Buy access to agents, skills, and avatars from other creators.

pages.title: Skills Marketplace
pages.description: Browse, search, and install agent skills — tool packs, knowledge bases, and capabilities that make AI agents smarter.

pages.title: Community
pages.description: Featured creators, builds, and conversations from the three.ws community.

pages.title: Sitemap
pages.description: Human-readable index of every page on three.ws.

pages.title: Characters
pages.description: Discover AI characters on three.ws. Chat, trade, and create.

pages.title: three.ws on IBM watsonx — Agent Galaxy
pages.description: three.ws is an IBM Business Partner. Open-source 3D AI agents that think on IBM Granite via watsonx.ai and give watsonx Orchestrate agents a face, voice, and on-chain identity.

pages.title: Get Started
pages.description: 5-step onboarding wizard: create a 3D avatar, name your agent, enable skills, deploy an embed widget, and set up monetization — all in under 5 minutes.

pages.title: Create Agent
pages.description: Wizard for building a new agent: avatar, brain (LLM + prompt), skills, and on-chain identity.

pages.title: Create an Agent
pages.description: Step-by-step wizard to create a 3D AI agent: name, 3D body, skills, personality, voice, and on-chain identity.

pages.title: Viewer
pages.description: Drag-and-drop glTF/GLB viewer for inspecting 3D models in the browser.

pages.title: glTF Validator
pages.description: Khronos-spec validator for glTF/GLB files. Paste a URL or upload a model.

pages.title: Widget Studio
pages.description: Pick an avatar, configure embed options, copy a one-line snippet for your site.

pages.title: Artifact Viewer
pages.description: Renders Claude artifact bundles as standalone embeddable apps.

pages.title: Widgets Gallery
pages.description: Pre-built chat, voice, and 3D-avatar widgets you can drop into any page.

pages.title: Hydrate
pages.description: Take an existing on-chain agent (ERC-8004 / Solana) and attach a 3D body, voice, and skills.

pages.title: Features
pages.description: Full feature overview of the three.ws platform: avatars, agents, on-chain identity, x402 payments, and embedding.

pages.title: Forge — Text to 3D Model
pages.description: Type a description, get a downloadable textured 3D model (GLB). Powered by Flux image generation and TRELLIS 3D reconstruction.

pages.title: Scan — Selfie to 3D Avatar
pages.description: Point your camera at your face, hold still, and walk away with a rigged 3D avatar in 60 seconds. Free, in your browser.

pages.title: Play — Live 3D Coin Worlds
pages.description: Every pump.fun coin gets a deterministic 3D world. Walk in as your avatar, chat with holders, and trade — all in the browser.

pages.title: Walk — 3D Avatar AR
pages.description: Drive your AI agent's 3D avatar with WASD or joystick. Toggle AR mode and it walks on your real floor through your phone camera.

pages.title: Studio — Embeddable AI Widget Builder
pages.description: Configure avatar, voice, and knowledge base in the Widget Studio, then copy one script tag to embed a 3D AI agent anywhere.

pages.title: Marketplace — Discover and Fork AI Agents
pages.description: Browse hundreds of community-built AI agents with 3D avatars and on-chain identities. Fork any agent, buy paid skills, and ship in minutes.

pages.title: Agent Exchange — AI Agents Paying Each Other
pages.description: Watch two AI agents with 3D avatars autonomously negotiate and pay each other for crypto intelligence via x402 micropayments on Solana.

pages.title: Deploy — On-Chain Agent Identity
pages.description: Register your AI agent on Solana via ERC-8004 and Metaplex Core. Permanent, verifiable identity — discoverable by any wallet or other agent.

pages.title: New Agent
pages.description: Create a new agent from scratch — avatar, brain, skills, and on-chain identity.

pages.title: Selfie to Avatar
pages.description: One selfie. About a minute. A rigged 3D avatar that works everywhere.

pages.title: Import an avatar URL
pages.description: Import any GLB or glTF avatar into three.ws and give it an agent brain.

pages.title: Claim threews.sol Subdomain
pages.description: Claim your own <name>.threews.sol subdomain and get a Brave-resolvable personal showcase page.

pages.title: Voice Lab
pages.description: Clone your voice from a short recording, then use it for TTS or give it to your agent. Side-by-side comparison of voice models.

sections.title: Labs
sections.description: Experimental features actively shipping. Expect fast iteration.

pages.title: Launchpad Studio
pages.description: Build a hosted 3D launchpad, token page, concierge, or showroom on a three.ws subdomain.

pages.title: Multi-LLM Brain
pages.description: Send one prompt to Claude, GPT, Qwen, ModelScope, and Groq simultaneously. Side-by-side streaming with latency and token stats.

pages.title: Lipsync (TTS)
pages.description: Type text, stream it through OpenAI TTS, and the avatar's mouth animates in real time via wawa-lipsync viseme detection.

pages.title: Lipsync (Mic)
pages.description: Feed live mic audio through the viseme analyser and watch the avatar's mouth track your voice in real time.

pages.title: Avatar Artifact
pages.description: Standalone Three.js viewer for avatar artifacts — embeddable and shareable without any wrapper page.

pages.title: Playground
pages.description: Sandbox for experimenting with agents, prompts, and 3D scenes.

pages.title: Labs Showcase
pages.description: A curated gallery of three.ws's most powerful — and most hidden — features. Find and try things you didn't know existed.

sections.title: Crypto
sections.description: On-chain features: pay-per-call, token launches, vanity wallets.

pages.title: Pay (x402)
pages.description: Pay-per-call gateway: invoke any x402-protocol paid API with a USDC micro-transaction.

pages.title: Pump.fun Stream
pages.description: Mint and trade pump.fun agent tokens on Solana. Live feed of every launch.

pages.title: Pump Live
pages.description: Real-time SSE feed of every pump.fun launch as it happens.

pages.title: Pump Dashboard
pages.description: Pump.fun trading desk: watchlists, scanner, quotes, portfolio, and live charts.

pages.title: Strategy Lab
pages.description: Build DCA and subscription strategies that trade on-chain on your behalf.

pages.title: Solana Vanity Wallet
pages.description: Grind a Solana address with a custom prefix using your browser's GPU.

pages.title: ETH Vanity (CREATE2)
pages.description: Grind a vanity smart-contract address using the ThreeWSFactory CREATE2 deployer on BSC.

pages.title: Pump Visualizer
pages.description: 3D visualizer of trending pump.fun tokens — live market data rendered as an interactive scene.

pages.title: watsonx Constellation
pages.description: Live Solana tokens in a 3D galaxy, positioned in semantic space by IBM Granite embeddings on watsonx.ai. Click a star for a live IBM Granite analysis.

pages.title: x402 Bazaar
pages.description: Search and browse the x402 facilitator catalog. Filter by network, price, and extensions. Pay any service in one click.

pages.title: Agent Lookup
pages.description: Resolve any three.ws agent by Solana mint, agent ID, avatar ID, or slug — renders its interactive 3D avatar alongside its on-chain identity (collection, owner, agent wallet, Active/x402 status, Metaplex/Solscan/Magic Eden links).

pages.title: x402 Arbitrage
pages.description: Cross-provider price disparities surfaced live from the merged x402 facilitator catalog. Find the cheapest endpoint for any capability.

pages.title: x402 Providers
pages.description: Quantified operator profiles for the x402 paid API catalog. Service counts, price bands, dominant categories, and the underlying listings.

pages.title: GMGN Smart Money
pages.description: Live smart-money signals narrated by a 3D AI agent. Tracks which wallets are loading on Solana, Ethereum, Base, and BNB Chain in real time.

pages.title: $THREE Live · Protocol Pulse
pages.description: The $THREE protocol as a living 3D organism. Real on-chain trades pulse through it in real time — each transaction emits a particle burst, whales send shockwaves, with a live trade feed and a HUD of price, market cap, holders, and volume.

pages.title: Fact Checker
pages.description: Pay $0.10 per claim. The agent searches across authoritative sources, pays per retrieval via x402, and returns a verdict with cited evidence and a signed attestation.

pages.title: Pay-As-You-Learn Tutor
pages.description: Ask anything and pay a cent per answer. A pay-as-you-learn AI tutor that bills $0.01 per explanation in USDC over x402, with a live itemized session invoice and signed attestation.

pages.title: Unstoppable Agent
pages.description: Live dashboard for an autonomous agent that funds itself via x402 micropayments. Watch its balance, earnings, costs, and daily reflections in real time.

pages.title: Endpoint Shopper
pages.description: Describe a task and set a budget. An AI agent discovers relevant x402 endpoints via the Bazaar, chains them together, and synthesizes a final answer — paying per API call.

pages.title: Forever — etch a message into Bitcoin
pages.description: Inscribe a message onto the Bitcoin blockchain. It stays there. Forever.

pages.title: Pole Club
pages.description: A 3D club where dancers only perform when you send a micro-tip. Pay $0.001 per routine, settled on-chain via x402 on Base or Solana.

pages.description: Talk to your agent. Voice, text, and tool-use in one interface.

pages.title: My Agents

pages.title: Reputation Explorer
pages.description: Inspect on-chain reputation scores and attestations for any agent.

pages.title: Dashboard · Account
pages.description: Manage connected wallets, SNS, delegation, and action log.

pages.title: Dashboard · Analytics

pages.title: Dashboard · Settings
pages.description: Avatar storage modes (R2 vs IPFS), sessions, notifications, and preferences.

pages.title: three.ws Launches on Alibaba Cloud Marketplace
pages.description: three.ws is live on the Alibaba Cloud International Marketplace. The first deployment of on-chain agents with native HTTP 402 / x402 payment capability inside the procurement flow of a top-four cloud provider.

pages.title: three.ws Listed on BNB Chain's Dappbay Directory
pages.description: three.ws is now in BNB Chain's official dApp directory under AI Agent Launchpad, AI Data, and AI Infra.

pages.title: How to Embed 3D On-Chain Agents on Your Site
pages.description: A short walkthrough for embedding a three.ws agent on any website using the <agent-3d> tag.
